title: carduus strictus
intro: Carduus strictus, also known as strict brome or strict thistle, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, due to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Carduus strictus include reducing swelling and relieving symptoms associated with menopausal and gynecological issues, as well as lowering cholesterol levels and blood pressure. Carduus strictus can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
